Description: Represents a record of an organism's presence at a specific time and place, often tied to a specimen or observation.
Associated_Terms: occurrenceID (unique identifier, e.g., gbifID = 4102173295 for a Lepidium barnebyanum record),basisOfRecord (e.g., PreservedSpecimen, HumanObservation),catalogNumber (identifier for a specimen in a collection),recordedBy (who collected the specimen),eventDate (date of observation/collection),organismQuantity (number of individuals),occurrenceRemarks (additional notes)

Description: Describes the context of an observation or sampling event, such as a field survey or collection trip.

Description: Defines the geographic location where an occurrence or event took place.
